last_action: Implemented secure admin password change workflow and encrypted database secrets management.
summary: Phase 8: Security and Advanced Configuration. Moved all .env secrets to an encrypted database table. Implemented a secure password change workflow requiring verification of the current password. Dashboard UI now includes an 'Advanced Settings' section for managing encrypted system secrets with masking for privacy.
next_steps: Verify building-level filtering for financial reports.
Full end-to-end regression testing of the registration and billing cycle.

team_notes.Gemini-CLI: Application is now significantly more secure with encrypted database secrets. The admin password change flow is verified and robust. Fixed all structural and 422/500 errors in the dashboard and backend.
